name: foundry-virtual-tabletop
tagline: A self-hosted virtual tabletop for playing tabletop role-playing games online
description: Foundry Virtual Tabletop is a self-hosted virtual tabletop for playing tabletop RPGs online. It provides dynamic maps, character sheets, dice rollers, and third-party modules. Ideal for private online gaming sessions.

features.title: Virtual Tabletop
features.description: Run tabletop role-playing games in a virtual environment

features.title: Game System Support
features.description: Support multiple tabletop game systems and rule sets

features.title: Map and Scene Management
features.description: Create and manage maps and scenes for gameplay

features.title: Player and GM Roles
features.description: Separate permissions for game masters and players

features.title: Dice Rolling
features.description: Roll and display dice results during sessions
